_comment: App Store Connect metadata — en-US (primary). Source of truth for the en-US locale row on App Store Connect. SCHEMA.md documents every field, its character limit, and which ASC API field it maps to. Edit this file, then run tools/ci/scripts/asc-upload-metadata.sh to push. Tone bible: docs/02-gdd/narrative/00-tone-bible.md. Display name locked per ADR-0016.
name: Brave Bunny: Survivors
subtitle: Hop. Swarm. Survive.
promotional_text: Eight 8-minute roguelite runs. Auto-attack heroes, evolve weapons, hop on.
description:
Brave Bunny: Survivors is a cheerful auto-attack roguelite for one thumb and 8 minutes.

Pick a hero. Hop into a meadow full of rascals. Watch your carrot boomerang, sunbeam, and daisy mines do the work while you focus on dodging and picking the right level-up gifts.

FEATURES

— EIGHT HEROES. Bunny, tortoise, fox, owl, panda, and three more to unlock. Each plays its own way.
— TWELVE WEAPONS THAT EVOLVE. Pair the right two and watch a weapon grow up.
— FIVE BIOMES. Meadow, beach, forest, cavern, snow. Each adds one new hazard and one new set of troublemakers.
— LEVEL-UP DRAFT. Three gifts, every level. Pick a build, change your run, keep hopping.
— ONE THUMB. Auto-attack means you focus on movement and choices, not aiming.
— EIGHT MINUTES. Every run is a complete arc. Win, lose, dust off, go again.

WHY PLAY

— A roguelite with a smile on every frame. No grimdark, no shouting, no microtransactions that block content.
— Quick runs that respect your time. 8 minutes start to finish.
— Family-safe wherever you point your phone. Soft register, no gore, no scary stuff.
— A friendly older-sibling voice cheering you on, not an esports caster yelling at you.

SUPPORT

We read every email. If something feels off, write to us and we'll fix it. Thanks for hopping along.
release_notes: Launch! Eight heroes, twelve evolving weapons, five biomes, 8-minute runs. Hop in.
_todo_validation: Run `fastlane deliver --validate-only` after first upload to confirm the schema matches current ASC requirements; update SCHEMA.md if fields shift.
